_doc: Patterns listed here are excluded from lint checks to reduce false positives
_schema_doc: schema_version must match EXPECTED_SCHEMA_VERSION in check_libtorch_patterns.sh

check_1_select_assignment.description: Exclude valid in-place methods from select()= check

check_2_slice_assignment.description: Exclude valid in-place methods from slice()= check

check_5_from_blob.description: Files with enforced CPU wrappers (safe from_blob usage)

check_7_bracket_assignment.description: Exclude valid operators and non-tensor patterns
